query: SELECT title, imageUrl, phase FROM works WHERE title LIKE '%Above%Below%' OR title LIKE '%Theatre%Memory%' OR title LIKE '%Celestial Secrets 8%' OR title LIKE '%Gravity%Well%' OR title LIKE '%Therion%' OR title LIKE '%Covenant%' OR title LIKE '%Ink Storm%' LIMIT 20;
